title: MCST regional festival annual index
claim: MCST annual regional festival index is strongest for 2017-2026; 2016 is not in that annual index.

title: MCST 2016 culture tourism festival evaluation report
claim: 2016 backfill exists for culture-tourism festivals but does not prove all regional festivals.

title: National culture festival standard data
claim: Structured national festival fields are available, but historical completeness must be verified by pull.

title: Korea Tourism Data Lab festival analysis
claim: Festival visitor, daily average, spending and related trend signals can be collected where available.

title: Korea Tourism Data Lab regional caveats
claim: Big-data visitor and spending values should be used as trend indicators and can have aggregation caveats.

title: Local Finance 365 event festival cost accounting
claim: Event-level total cost, revenue, net cost and dates are available above disclosure thresholds.

title: Local Finance 365 event festival budget allocation
claim: Festival-related budget categories and ratios are available from 2015 onward.

title: Local Finance 365 contract status
claim: Contract method, name, date, amount and vendor are available from 2016 onward where accessible.

title: Nara bid notice API
claim: Bid notices and change history are available, with business-type operation routing required.

title: Nara contract and process APIs
claim: Pre-spec, notice, award and contract chains can be followed when identifiers are available.

title: W3C visual presentation
claim: Dense text must keep readable line length and spacing.

title: W3C table tutorial
claim: Complex evidence tables need captions, summaries and clear headers.
